rulings.Case Title: EILYN DATAYLO et al VS. VILLA M. JACINTO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 1, 2018, Line 1. DEFENDANT VILLA JACINTO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. GRANTED. Motion creates a credibility problem regarding the alleged (per January 6, 2015 Proof of Service) December 31, 2014 personal service of the Statement of Damages. No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)
